text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What should I do for training today?<n>Hm,
considering the skies are cloudy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What good timing. You there! I'd like<n>your input
on something!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What will you be focusing on today?<n>Researching
a new running style, or<n>quick decision-making?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, an excellent choice! The running<n>techniques
of Umamusume are<n>always improving.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see. The success or failure of a race<n>hinges on
split-second decisions,<n>which makes the speed
of one's<n>thinking important indeed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I shall take that into consideration. I<n>wonder what
results will come of this<n>chance meeting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Happenstance and serendipity are<n>factors that
cannot be ignored in<n>research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is why I took advantage of two<n>chance
occurrences—you and the<n>cloudy skies.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You too should embrace<n>happenstance to avoid
falling into a<n>rut! Doing so is the path to truth!
